title: Janani Suraksha Yojana
description: Cash assistance for pregnant women for institutional delivery. Covers ante-natal care, delivery, and post-natal care expenses.

title: Ayushman Bharat - PMJAY
description: Health insurance cover of Rs. 5 lakhs per family per year for secondary and tertiary hospitalization.

title: Swachh Bharat Mission (Urban)
description: Promotes cleanliness, solid waste management, and sanitation in urban areas. Community toilet construction and waste segregation.

title: PM Awas Yojana (Urban)
description: Financial assistance for construction/purchase of pucca houses for urban poor including EWS, LIG, and MIG categories.

title: Jal Jeevan Mission
description: Ensures functional household tap connection to every rural household. Provides safe and adequate drinking water.

title: Digital Gujarat Portal
description: Online platform for government certificates, ration card, income certificate, caste certificate, and other citizen services.

title: Ujjwala Yojana (Free LPG)
description: Free LPG connection to BPL households. Reduces dependence on firewood and improves women's health.

title: Kisan SAMPADA Yojana
description: Food processing industry support including infrastructure, logistics, and capacity building for farmers.
